computerReply: Distress beacon used by the European Hegemony.

userQuery: download all information regarding signal beacon from Starbase mainframe.

userQuery: No extraterrestrial source ever used this code?

userQuery: Locate all Earth deep space launches from 2123 until 2190, with a destination in or near the Ficus sector.
